compiled_state.title: FP auto-fallback scope contract document and fp-rate-tracker.sh with per-ticket per-write semantics
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Depends on T9 (4b2c-1504). Implement:
(a) `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/fp-auto-fallback-scope.md` — pins the 4 scope constraints
(b) `plugins/dso/scripts/fp-rate-tracker.sh` — detects FP rate and emits FALLBACK_ENGAGED signal

Both deliverables together make `test_fp_rate_tracker_engages_fallback` pass (GREEN).

## Implementation Notes

### (a) Contract Document: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/fp-auto-fallback-scope.md
Pin the 4 scope constraints as specified in the Story DD:
1. Per-write: fallback engages on next emission, NOT retroactive
2. New events only: already-written standard/deep events remain honored; classifier's next emission degrades to minimal
3. Per-ticket scope: NOT global, NOT per-epic; isolated to affected ticket
4. Validators stay depth-agnostic: regardless of fallback state, validators accept all depth tiers (Story 2 invariant)
Also document: fallback-engaged marker — when fallback triggers, the next minimal-tier event written for that ticket MUST include `"fallback_engaged": true` in its top-level fields so operators can trace transitions.

### (b) Script: plugins/dso/scripts/fp-rate-tracker.sh
CLI interface:
  --ticket-id=<id>     Required; identifies the ticket scope
  --fp-count=<N>       Number of false positives observed in rolling window
  --total-events=<N>   Total events in rolling window
  --query              Query mode: exit 0 if fallback active for ticket, exit 1 if not

Behavior:
- Compute fp_rate = fp_count / total_events
- If fp_rate > 0.10 (10% threshold): emit FALLBACK_ENGAGED signal and write state marker to /tmp/fp-fallback-<ticket-id>.state
- State marker format: JSON with ticket_id, fp_rate, engaged_at (timestamp), scope (always "per_ticket"), new_events_only (always true)
- In --query mode: check for /tmp/fp-fallback-<ticket-id>.state; exit 0 if exists and not stale (TTL: 24h), exit 1 otherwise

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contract document exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/fp-auto-fallback-scope.md
- [ ] Contract pins all 4 scope constraints
  Verify: grep -q 'per.write\|per_write' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/fp-auto-fallback-scope.md && grep -q 'new.*events.*only\|new_events_only' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/fp-auto-fallback-scope.md && grep -q 'per.ticket\|per_ticket' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/fp-auto-fallback-scope.md && grep -q 'depth.agnostic' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/fp-auto-fallback-scope.md
- [ ] Contract documents fallback-engaged marker field
  Verify: grep -q 'fallback_engaged' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/fp-auto-fallback-scope.md
- [ ] fp-rate-tracker.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/fp-rate-tracker.sh
- [ ] Tracker emits FALLBACK_ENGAGED when FP rate > 10%
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/fp-rate-tracker.sh --ticket-id=test-t1 --fp-count=11 --total-events=100 | grep -q 'FALLBACK_ENGAGED:'
- [ ] Tracker does NOT emit FALLBACK_ENGAGED when FP rate ≤ 10%
  Verify: ! bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/fp-rate-tracker.sh --ticket-id=test-t2 --fp-count=5 --total-events=100 | grep -q 'FALLBACK_ENGAGED:'
- [ ] test_fp_rate_tracker_engages_fallback passes GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-fp-fallback-scope-contract.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

comments.body: AC amendment: fp-rate-tracker.sh provides the contract interface for the classifier (Story 86ad-f5e7) to query fallback state. Add explicit note to T10 implementation: the contract document (fp-auto-fallback-scope.md) must include an 'Integration Interface' section showing: (1) How the classifier checks fallback status before emitting: 'bash fp-rate-tracker.sh --ticket-id=X --query; [ $? -eq 0 ] && EMIT_TIER=minimal || EMIT_TIER=$COMPUTED_TIER'. (2) The interface is one-directional: fp-rate-tracker only receives fp_count/total_events from the validator layer, never from the classifier. This documents the integration boundary without requiring the classifier implementation (which is in Story 3).
comments.author: Test
